features.description: Background agents from `claude agents` now auto-commit, push, and open a draft PR after worktree work instead of pausing
features.reference_changelog_line: Background agents launched from `claude agents` now commit, push, and open a draft PR when they finish code work in a worktree, instead of stopping to ask

features.description: Built-in Explore agent now inherits the main session's model (capped at opus) instead of always running on haiku.
features.reference_changelog_line: The built-in Explore agent now inherits the main session's model (capped at opus) instead of running on haiku

features.description: Subagents and context compaction now inherit the session's extended thinking configuration for delegated tasks.
features.reference_changelog_line: Subagents and context compaction now inherit the session's extended thinking configuration, improving output quality on delegated tasks

features.description: `claude --bg` combined with `--print`/`-p` is now rejected up front instead of silently creating an unattachable session
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed `claude --bg` silently creating an unattachable session when combined with `--print`/`-p`; the conflicting flags are now rejected up front

features.description: Subagents now treat messages from their launching agent as normal task direction, though never as user approval.
features.reference_changelog_line: Subagents now treat messages from the agent that launched them as normal task direction; an agent's message is still never treated as the user's approval

features.description: New `/dataviz` skill for chart and dashboard design guidance with a runnable color-palette validator.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `/dataviz` skill for chart and dashboard design guidance with a runnable color-palette validator

features.description: Notification hook now fires `agent_needs_input` and `agent_completed` events for background agents in `claude agents`.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added background agent notifications in `claude agents` — sessions that need input or finish now fire the `Notification` hook (`agent_needs_input` / `agent_completed`)

features.description: Removed the `/agents` wizard; manage subagents by asking Claude or editing `.claude/agents/` directly.
features.reference_changelog_line: Removed the `/agents` wizard; ask Claude to create or manage subagents, or edit `.claude/agents/` directly

features.description: Gateway adds `anthropicAws` (Claude Platform on AWS) as upstream provider; model-not-found responses advance the failove
features.reference_changelog_line: Gateway: added Claude Platform on AWS (anthropicAws) as an upstream provider; model-not-found responses now advance the failover chain
